---
title: "PRISMA 2020 Flow Diagram"
subtitle: "CHW Interventions for Maternal Mental Health in LMICs"
date: "2026-03-05"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
  docx: default
---

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    subgraph Identification
        A["Records identified through<br/>database searching<br/>(n = 1,247)"]
        B["Additional records identified<br/>through other sources<br/>(n = 10)"]
    end

    subgraph Screening
        C["Records after duplicates removed<br/>(n = 935)"]
        D["Records screened<br/>(title/abstract)<br/>(n = 935)"]
        E["Records excluded<br/>(n = 847)"]
        F["Full-text articles assessed<br/>for eligibility<br/>(n = 88)"]
        G["Full-text articles excluded,<br/>with reasons<br/>(n = 65)"]
    end

    subgraph Included
        H["Studies included in<br/>qualitative synthesis<br/>(n = 23)"]
        I["Studies included in<br/>quantitative synthesis<br/>(meta-analysis)<br/>(n = 18)"]
    end

    A --> C
    B --> C
    C --> D
    D --> E
    D --> F
    F --> G
    F --> H
    H --> I
```

## Database Contributions

| Database | Records Found | After Deduplication |
|----------|:------------:|:-------------------:|
| PubMed/MEDLINE | 487 | — |
| OpenAlex | 341 | — |
| Semantic Scholar | 198 | — |
| Europe PMC | 156 | — |
| CrossRef | 65 | — |
| Grey literature / hand search | 10 | — |
| **Total** | **1,257** | **935** |

## Full-Text Exclusion Reasons

| Reason | n |
|--------|--:|
| Wrong population (not perinatal, not LMIC) | 18 |
| Wrong intervention (specialist-delivered, pharmacological) | 22 |
| Wrong outcome (no validated depression/anxiety measure) | 12 |
| Wrong study design (non-comparative, protocol only) | 8 |
| Duplicate publication of included study | 5 |
| **Total excluded** | **65** |

## Studies Not in Meta-Analysis

Five of the 23 included studies were included in the qualitative synthesis only (not in the meta-analysis) because they did not report sufficient data to calculate standardized mean differences (means and standard deviations per arm at endpoint).

---

*This PRISMA flow diagram was generated with assistance from the Research Workflow Assistant (`@systematic-reviewer` agent and PRISMA Tracker MCP server). All screening decisions were made by the human reviewer.*
